sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الأُسْرَةُ عَلَى العَشَاءِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Porodica se svaki dan ocuplja na večeri.
sentences.translationEn: The family gathers for dinner every day.

sentences.translation: Otac pita o školi i učenju.
sentences.translationEn: The father asks about school and studying.

sentences.translation: Večera je vrijeme za komunikaciju i razgovor.
sentences.translationEn: Dinner is a time for connection and conversation.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا يُقَوِّي العَلَاقَةَ بَيْنَ أَفْرَادِ الأُسْرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo jača odnos između članova porodice.
sentences.translationEn: This strengthens the bond between family members.
